name: zoominfo
description: Prospecting and account research with ZoomInfo

interface.shortDescription: Prospecting and account research with ZoomInfo
interface.longDescription: Access ZoomInfo’s data and AI context within ChatGPT. Prospecting, Account Research, Verified Contacts, buying signals, and more are now available directly in your conversations.
defaultPrompt: Find target accounts in this industry and region with buying signals, then rank the best prospects.
Build a contact list for decision makers at these accounts with titles and company context.
Research a company in ZoomInfo and identify likely outreach hooks.
